__package__.yml.rawContents:
types:
  BadRequestErrorBody:
    docs: The request was malformed
    properties: {}
    extends:
      - Error
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ItemsResponse:
    properties:
      items: list<string>
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  Error:
    docs: Base error schema
    properties:
      code:
        type: string
        docs: Machine-readable error code
      message:
        type: string
        docs: Human-readable error message
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  InvalidInputError:
    docs: The request contained invalid input
    properties:
      invalidFields: optional<list<string>>
    extends:
      - Error
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  UnauthorizedErrorCode:
    enum:
      - UNABLE_TO_AUTHENTICATE
    docs: Machine-readable error code
    inline: true
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  UnauthorizedErrorBody:
    docs: Authentication failed
    properties:
      code:
        type: optional<UnauthorizedErrorCode>
        docs: Machine-readable error code
      message:
        type: string
        docs: Human-readable error message
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ForbiddenErrorCode:
    enum:
      - ACCESS_DENIED
    docs: Machine-readable error code
    inline: true
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
  ForbiddenErrorBody:
    docs: Access denied
    properties:
      code:
        type: optional<ForbiddenErrorCode>
        docs: Machine-readable error code
      message:
        type: string
        docs: Human-readable error message
    source:
      openapi: ../openapi.yml
errors:
  BadRequestError:
    status-code: 400
    type: BadRequestErrorBody
    docs: Bad request
    examples:
      - value:
          code: BAD_REQUEST
          message: message
  UnauthorizedError:
    status-code: 401
    type: UnauthorizedErrorBody
    docs: Unauthorized
  ForbiddenError:
    status-code: 403
    type: ForbiddenErrorBody
    docs: Forbidden
service:
  auth: false
  base-path: ''
  endpoints:
    listItems:
      path: /items
      method: GET
      source:
        openapi: ../openapi.yml
      response:
        docs: Success
        type: ItemsResponse
        status-code: 200
      errors:
        - BadRequestError
        - UnauthorizedError
        - ForbiddenError
      examples:
        - response:
            body:
              items:
                - items
  source:
    openapi: ../openapi.yml

rootApiFile.rawContents:
name: api
error-discrimination:
  strategy: status-code
display-name: Discriminator Shared Base Test
